text.title: Product Development Trends Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real deployments of Product Development Trends. Each ties a symptom to a root cause and a concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Bet on a trend because Twitter is buzzing.
antipattern.fix: Force >=3 source classes; reject single-class verdicts.

antipattern.symptom: Trend brief is prose paragraphs with no scores.
antipattern.fix: Render scores table per trend; reject prose-only sections.

antipattern.symptom: Bet on AR/VR with no exit criterion; 18 months later still 'investing'.
antipattern.fix: Require kill_criteria per bet; auto-flag missing kills at audit.
